hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(nix\s+profile\s+(install|add|remove)|cargo\s+install|pip3?\s+install|npm\s+install\s+-g)" && { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Use declarative config instead of imperative install\"}" ; exit 0; }; echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+(-[^\s]*r[^\s]*f|-[^\s]*f[^\s]*r)\s" && { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Use trash instead of rm -rf\"}" ; exit 0; }; echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push\s+(-f|--force)|git\s+push\s+.*--force" && { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Force push blocked - remove flag if intended\"}" ; exit 0; }; exit 0'
